description_long: This is a modern bungalow situated on a rectangular plot with a surrounding low fence and a driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a combination of single and double-story sections, with a prominent gable roof and a smaller cross-gabled extension. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, contrasted by a dark, shingled roof. Large rectangular windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. A covered porch is visible at the front, and a circular landscaped feature, possibly a fountain or planter, is set into the lawn. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and walkways, integrating the house into a suburban or urban neighborhood context.
description: A modern bungalow with a gable roof, light siding, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a landscaped plot with a driveway and circular lawn feature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, circular lawn feature, and driveway.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back facade, driveway extension, and the side of the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the double-story section, large window, and fenced boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch, side windows, and circular lawn feature.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single rectangular windows
